title: carex × josephi-schmittii
intro: Carex × josephi-schmittii, also known as Schmitt's sedge or Carex schmitii, is a hybrid plant species in the sedge family (Cyperaceae) that is native to the United States. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to be used as a diuretic and to help reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Carex × josephi-schmittii include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of kidney stones, and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections. Carex × josephi-schmittii can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to support urinary health and alleviate related symptoms.
